problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Fear. Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
